seoTitle: Tepko vs Terowie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tepko and Terowie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tepko and Terowie.
heading: Tepko vs Terowie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tepko, South Australia and Terowie, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Terowie has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Tepko (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tepko or Terowie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tepko has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Terowie scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tepko scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Terowie scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tepko or Terowie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Terowie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
